title: Hagströmer Library Catalogue
summary: The Hagströmer Library is part of Karolinska Institutet and consists of over 150,000 books and journals connected to disciplines adjacent to the medical sciences. The main collection derives from Karolinska Institutet and the Swedish Medical Association (Svenska Läkareförbundet) and the collection specialises in material from the period 1600-1990. The mission of the library is to preserve the cultural heritage of Karolinska Institutet, and it is the core of the Medical History and Heritage unit (MHK) at Karolinska Institutet.
Each card has been extracted from scanned volume pages, processed with OCR, and manually reviewed.
